languages.original_text: "I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."

languages.text: "Я не ищу в вере пользы для тела, алый жрец. Я укрепляю силу собственной души и взращиваю волю, умерщвляя плоть и отказываясь от ее соблазнов".
"I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."
languages.original_text: "Я не ищу в вере пользы для тела, алый жрец. Я укрепляю силу собственной души и взращиваю волю, умерщвляя плоть и отказываясь от ее соблазнов".

traits.locale_text: "I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."
"I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."
"I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."

languages.text: «No busco los beneficios de la fe en mi cuerpo, sacerdote carmesí. Refuerzo mi alma y cultivo mi voluntad mediante la mortificación de mi carne y el rechazo de sus tentaciones».
languages.original_text: "I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."

traits.locale_text: «No busco los beneficios de la fe en mi cuerpo, sacerdote carmesí. Refuerzo mi alma y cultivo mi voluntad mediante la mortificación de mi carne y el rechazo de sus tentaciones».

languages.text: 「私はこの身のために信仰の恩恵を求めているのではない、深紅の司祭よ。我が肉を苦しめ、その誘惑を退けることで、私は魂を鍛え、意志を培うのだ」
languages.original_text: "I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."

traits.locale_text: 「私はこの身のために信仰の恩恵を求めているのではない、深紅の司祭よ。我が肉を苦しめ、その誘惑を退けることで、私は魂を鍛え、意志を培うのだ」

languages.text: “我寻求信仰不为肉身的益处，红衣神甫。我克制肉体、拒绝诱惑是为巩固灵魂、锤炼意志。”
languages.original_text: "I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."

traits.locale_text: “我寻求信仰不为肉身的益处，红衣神甫。我克制肉体、拒绝诱惑是为巩固灵魂、锤炼意志。”

languages.text: "Ich suche keine Glaubensvorteile für meinen Körper, roter Priester. Ich stärke meine Seele und kultiviere meinen Willen durch die Kasteiung meines Fleisches und die Verweigerung seiner Versuchungen."
languages.original_text: "I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."

traits.locale_text: "Ich suche keine Glaubensvorteile für meinen Körper, roter Priester. Ich stärke meine Seele und kultiviere meinen Willen durch die Kasteiung meines Fleisches und die Verweigerung seiner Versuchungen."

languages.text: « Je ne recherche pas les bienfaits de la foi pour mon corps, prêtre écarlate. Je fortifie mon âme et cultive ma volonté en mortifiant ma chair et en rejetant les tentations. »
languages.original_text: "I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne recherche pas les bienfaits de la foi pour mon corps, prêtre écarlate. Je fortifie mon âme et cultive ma volonté en mortifiant ma chair et en rejetant les tentations. »

languages.text: "Bedenim için inancın faydalarını aramıyorum kızıl rahip. Bedenimi aşağılayarak ve baştan çıkarıcılıklarını reddederek ruhumu güçlendiriyor, irademi geliştiriyorum."
languages.original_text: "I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."

traits.locale_text: "Bedenim için inancın faydalarını aramıyorum kızıl rahip. Bedenimi aşağılayarak ve baştan çıkarıcılıklarını reddederek ruhumu güçlendiriyor, irademi geliştiriyorum."
